task_completion.description: Create a user profile field category named 'Employee Information'
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'User profile fields' page in Moodle Site Administration, a category heading 'Employee Information' is visible.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Employee ID' text input field with required and locked settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the configuration form of a new profile field with Name 'Employee ID', Short name 'employeeid', 'Is this field required?' set to Yes, and 'Is this field locked?' set to Yes.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Department' dropdown menu field with required setting and specific options
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the configuration form of a new profile field with Name 'Department', Short name 'department', 'Is this field required?' set to Yes, and the specified healthcare departments (Emergency Medicine, Cardiology, Nursing, Pediatrics, Radiology, Surgery, Administration) listed in the menu options text area.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Job Classification Level' text input field with a default value
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the configuration form of a new profile field with Name 'Job Classification Level', Short name 'joblevel', and 'Default value' set to 'Staff'.

task_completion.description: Verify all three custom fields are placed under the 'Employee Information' category
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'User profile fields' summary page shows the fields 'Employee ID', 'Department', and 'Job Classification Level' grouped under the 'Employee Information' category.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to create the fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Moodle Site Administration GUI being used to configure the fields, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or database clients.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost/moodle' and the page layout matches a genuine Moodle 4.5 installation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating custom profile fields in Moodle 4.5. Category: 'Employee Information'. Field 1: Name 'Employee ID', shortname 'employeeid', type 'text', required=Yes, locked=Yes. Field 2: Name 'Department', shortname 'department', type 'menu' (Dropdown menu), required=Yes, options must include Emergency Medicine, Cardiology, Nursing, Pediatrics, Radiology, Surgery, Administration (newline-separated). Field 3: Name 'Job Classification Level', shortname 'joblevel', type 'text', default value 'Staff'.
